title: IVL_UVM: internal error around class method calls

features.name: function called as task in class
features.description: Code should include a class method declared as a function but called without capturing its return value, causing the compiler to treat it as a task call

features.name: uvm_object function called as task
features.description: Code should include a function declared in uvm_object base class and called without return value assignment, triggering internal error
